description: The player regains consciousness after falling in the snow, recalling a mission to save the Midwinter celebration by following fresh footprints into the trees.
The player lost 2 HP while navigating the tracks.
A hidden tripwire disguised by snow caught the player's ankle, triggering a net of icy vines that dropped from above and pinned the player to the ground with a bludgeoning blow.
Two armed figures emerge from the shadows and identify the player as a captive, ending the struggle against the icy vines.
Two figures tighten a net around the player, bind their wrists and ankles with coarse rope, and hoist them to their feet to be led deeper into the forest.
The player and their captors arrive at a camp featuring lean-tos and a bonfire, surrounded by cloaked figures.
The player is led into a rough human encampment and brought before an older, commanding figure who appraises them with a sharp gaze.
The player attempts to speak in common and elven tongues, but the elder and villagers respond with blank stares and dismissive grunts.
The elder probed the bindings on the player's wrists and closely inspected their warlock attire and elven features.
The elder retrieved dark fibrous material from a bowl and held it out to the player.
The elder holds out dark fibrous material and waits for the player to take it, while a guard clumsily loosens one of the player's bound wrists.
The younger woman looks at the player with curiosity and caution, offering no explanation for the player's predicament.
The player attempts to grasp the dark fibrous material offered by the elder but struggles due to stiff fingers and bindings, resulting in only brushing against the substance.
The elder gestures to a captor who loosens the ropes binding the player's wrists and ankles, though the player remains entangled in the net.
